title: Strict Typing, Nullability, and Boundary Validation
description: Establish a strict type baseline without confusing static types with runtime validation. Learners cumulatively produce a strict type and boundary contract through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Enable the language or checker strict baseline and document intentional deviations.
Model null, missing, unknown, and unchecked indexed access explicitly.
Validate files, network data, environment variables, and user input at runtime.
